title: RemittanceDeliveryMethodTypeValues
description: Specifies the method used to deliver the remittance advice information. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fax
x-enumeration-literals.description: Remittance advice information must be faxed.

x-enumeration-literals.name: ElectronicDataInterchange
x-enumeration-literals.description: Remittance advice information must be sent through Electronic Data Interchange (EDI).

x-enumeration-literals.name: UniformResourceIdentifier
x-enumeration-literals.description: Remittance advice information needs to be sent to a Uniform Resource Identifier (URI). URI is a compact string of characters that uniquely identify an abstract or physical resource. URI's are the super-set of identifiers, such as URLs, email addresses, ftp sites, etc, and as such, provide the syntax for all of the identification schemes.

x-enumeration-literals.name: EMail
x-enumeration-literals.description: Remittance advice information must be sent through e-mail.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Post
x-enumeration-literals.description: Remittance advice information must be sent through postal services.

x-enumeration-literals.name: SMS
x-enumeration-literals.description: Remittance advice information must be sent through by phone as a short message service (SMS).
